title: Install savepointd + digikoma-savepoint + fs-touchd + savepoint-cli via wrkstrm-identifier install-cli
description: Currently the 4 binaries are installed via manual `swift build -c release` + `ln -sf` to ~/.local/bin/. The canonical path is wrkstrm-identifier's install-cli flow: discover-clis (walk substrate emit input JSON) → bootstrap-registry (compute composed-hash names) → install-cli --execute (SPM install per registry entry). This formalizes the install + lets the substrate emit-aliases.zsh include them + survives swift package clean cycles without symlink rot. The 4 CLIs aren't in substrate-cli-registry.json yet; needs a discover-clis pass first or manual registry entry author.
